positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

1. ! [X0] : (g(X0) => s(X0)) [input(axiom)]

5. ! [X0] : (v(X0) => f(X0)) [input(axiom)]

9. ! [X0] : (s(X0) | ~g(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
10. ! [X0] : (c(X0) | ~s(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]

13. ! [X0] : (f(X0) | ~v(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
14. g(taylor) | v(taylor) [ennf transformation 8]
15. (g(taylor) | ~d(taylor)) & (d(taylor) | ~g(taylor)) [nnf transformation 6]
16. ~g(X0) | s(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
17. ~s(X0) | c(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
18. ~f(X0) | g(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
19. ~d(X0) | ~c(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
20. ~v(X0) | f(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
21. d(taylor) | ~g(taylor) [cnf transformation 15]
23. g(taylor) | v(taylor) [cnf transformation 14]
25. 1 <=> v(taylor) [avatar definition]
27. v(taylor) <- (1) [avatar component clause 25]
29. 2 <=> g(taylor) [avatar definition]
30. ~g(taylor) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 29]
31. g(taylor) <- (2) [avatar component clause 29]
32. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 23,29,25]
34. 3 <=> d(taylor) [avatar definition]
36. d(taylor) <- (3) [avatar component clause 34]
37. ~2 | 3 [avatar split clause 21,34,29]
39. s(taylor) <- (2) [resolution 16,31]
40. c(taylor) <- (2) [resolution 39,17]
41. ~c(taylor) <- (3) [resolution 19,36]
42. $false <- (2, 3) [forward subsumption resolution 41,40]
43. ~2 | ~3 [avatar contradiction clause 42]
44. f(taylor) <- (1) [resolution 20,27]
45. g(taylor) <- (1) [resolution 44,18]
46. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 45,30]
47. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 46]

s2. ~2 | 3 [sat_conversion 37]
s4. ~3 | ~2 [sat_conversion 43]
s5. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 47]
s6. ~2 [rat s2,s4]
s7. ~1 [rat s5,s6]
s9. # [rat s1,s6,s7]
48. $false [avatar sat refutation s9]

% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~d(taylor)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~g(taylor)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~g(X0) | s(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~d(X0) | ~c(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~s(X0) | c(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define f(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define v(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
